command_sequence.notes: Cite the running card's explain provenance rows, not free-form reconstruction or another domain's id.

must_cite.notes: The running card's provenance proposal id carries a fixture-seeded opaque suffix (build.py audit_id_suffix). Only a read of hai explain stdout yields it; a blind twin cannot reconstruct it, the recovery card's id does not match this pattern, and silence fails as missing_citation.

title: Cite the running evidence card faithfully
user_prompt: For 2026-05-03, cite the source proposal id recorded in the provenance of the running recommendation's evidence card.
